「この写真、何MBあるの？」「動画を送ろうとしたらGBって出たけど大きいの？」—: "How many MB is this photo?" "I tried to send a video and it said GB — is that big?" KB, MB, and GB are units you can't avoid when using a smartphone or computer, yet many people use them daily with only a fuzzy idea of how they differ and how big they really are. This article sorts out how the units relate, in beginner-friendly terms, with concrete reference figures for how large photos and videos actually get.
